reviews.comment:
Los playeros atienden bien, pero hay un flaco sin identificacion alguna, que te hecha de mala manera si te acercas a mirar el río, porque segun dice, es propiedad privada. Absurdo.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants are friendly, but there's a skinny guy with no ID who rudely kicks you out if you go near the river, claiming it's private property. Absurd.

reviews.comment:
Es una de las pocas estaciones que quedaron de abastecimiento de combustibles en el rio , que esta de paso aguas arriba por el Rio Lujan si se busca como destino el Rio Parana por el Canal Arias . En General la atencion es amable los precios son los comunes ya que tambien despachan  combustible en tierra a vehiculos . Hace tiempo tenia un Almacen / Drugstore , que desaparecio ... Recomendacion fines de semana en horario  11.00 hasta las 14.00 evitar cargar combustible o ir con paciencia de la mano ... se hacen colas de hasta mas de 100 m. de las veces que hemos ido siempre tenian combustible para despachar .

(Translated by Google)
It's one of the few remaining fuel stations on the river, located upstream on the Luján River if you're heading for the Paraná River via the Arias Canal. Generally, the service is friendly, and the prices are typical since they also sell fuel to vehicles on land. They used to have a general store/drugstore, but it's gone now. A word of advice: on weekends, between 11:00 AM and 2:00 PM, avoid filling up or go with a lot of patience... the lines can be over 100 meters long. Every time we've been, they've had fuel available.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14089662263619113914/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQwcFBYRVFnEAE
